metadataRefresh.datasetDiscoveryTooltip: How often Dremio will scan Cloud Spanner for new tables

elements.label: GCP Project ID
elements.tooltip: Google Cloud project that contains your Spanner instance

elements.label: Service Account Key File
elements.tooltip: Path to a GCP service account JSON key file. Leave blank to use Application Default Credentials (ADC) — e.g. Workload Identity, gcloud login, or the GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS environment variable.

elements.label: Split Parallelism
elements.tooltip: Number of parallel read segments per table. Higher values increase throughput on large tables (default 4).

elements.label: Query Timeout (seconds)
elements.tooltip: Maximum seconds to wait for a Spanner query to complete (default 300).

elements.label: Schema Cache TTL (seconds)
elements.tooltip: How long to cache the Arrow schema per table before re-fetching from INFORMATION_SCHEMA (default 300).
